title: Delicate Venezuelan Pea Eggplant Tagine
description: A cultured and festive Venezuelan dish featuring pea eggplant, deep fried using agemono technique, and cooked in a tagine pot, suitable for diabetic friendly diets.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the tagine pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the sliced pea eggplant and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until it is tender and lightly browned.
Add the cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20 minutes, or until the pea eggplant is very tender.
Stir in the chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
Deep fry the pea eggplant slices using agemono technique before adding to the tagine pot for extra crispiness.
